# URL Shortener Module

Use `src/index.ts` as the public entrypoint.

Key exports:
- `createUrlShortenerService`
- `createUrlShortenerMemoryStore`
- `createD1UrlShortenerStore`
- `createSequentialUrlShortenerIdFactory`
- `createSequentialUrlShortenerCodeFactory`

Core workflows:
- create short link
- resolve short link and record click analytics
- deactivate short link
- get link stats
- list recent links

The module stores D1 link and click records. Route adapters may add KV redirect caching.
